← All tools

Flag Look-Alike Finder

Describe a flag design — or drop in an image — and see which real national and regional flags it resembles most, with a heads-up if it lands uncomfortably close to an existing one. Everything runs in your browser.

1. Build a quick description

How many main colors?
Colors (most dominant first)
Stripes:
Aspect ratio
Symbols on it? (optional)

2. Or analyze an image

🏳️

Drag & drop a flag image, paste one, or

We'll pull the dominant colors and aspect ratio straight from the pixels and fill them in above — layout and symbols aren't reliably auto-detectable, so pick those yourself.

Try an example

Related tools

🛠 Design in Flag Designer 🔍 Analyze an image in Flag Analyzer

Closest real-world matches

Approximate similarity based on a curated reference set of ~200 flags with hand-estimated colors — not an authoritative vexillological database. Nothing you enter or upload leaves your browser · a max tool
